ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle model */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Truck) */,
  "body_style" TEXT /* Body style of the vehicle (e.g., 4-door, 2-door) */,
  "num_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors in the vehicle */,
  "num_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trims" (
  "trim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trim */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the trim belongs to */,
  "trim_name" TEXT /* Name of the trim (e.g., EX, EXL, EXL DVD) */,
  "trim_level" TEXT /* Level of the trim (e.g., Base, Mid, High) */,
  "trim_description" TEXT /* Description of the trim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trims_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the engine */,
  "engine_size" TEXT /* Size of the engine (e.g., 3.5L) */,
  "engine_type" TEXT /* Type of the engine (e.g., V6) */,
  "num_cylinders" INTEGER /* Number of cylinders in the engine */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine (in ft/lbs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission */,
  "transmission_name" TEXT /* Name of the transmission */,
  "transmission_type" TEXT /* Type of the transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "transmission_speeds" INTEGER /* Number of speeds in the transmission */,
  "automatic_manual" TEXT /* Type of transmission (Automatic or Manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_efficiencies" (
  "fuel_efficiency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel efficiency metric */,
  "trim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trim the fuel efficiency metric belongs to */,
  "city_mileage_imp" REAL /* City mileage in imperial units (mpg) */,
  "highway_mileage_imp" REAL /* Highway mileage in imperial units (mpg) */,
  "combined_mileage_imp" REAL /* Combined mileage in imperial units (mpg) */,
  "city_mileage_metric" REAL /* City mileage in metric units (L/100 km) */,
  "highway_mileage_metric" REAL /* Highway mileage in metric units (L/100 km) */,
  "combined_mileage_metric" REAL /* Combined mileage in metric units (L/100 km) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Gasoline, Diesel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_efficiency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_efficiencies_trim_id FOREIGN KEY ("trim_id") REFERENCES trims ("trim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "performance_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine the performance metric belongs to */,
  "horsepower" INTEGER /* Horsepower of the engine */,
  "torque" INTEGER /* Torque of the engine (in ft/lbs) */,
  "zero_to_sixty" REAL /* Zero-to-sixty mph acceleration time (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivetrains" (
  "drivetrain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drivetrain */,
  "drivetrain_name" TEXT /* Name of the drivetrain */,
  "drivetrain_type" TEXT /* Type of the drivetrain (e.g., FWD, AWD) */,
  "drive_type" TEXT /* Type of drive (e.g., Front-Wheel Drive, All-Wheel Drive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drivetrain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_trims" (
  "vehicle_trim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-trim relationship */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "trim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trim */,
  "trim_year" INTEGER /* Year of the trim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_trim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_trims_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_trims_trim_id FOREIGN KEY ("trim_id") REFERENCES trims ("trim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "engine_transmissions" (
  "engine_transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engine-transmission relationship */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the engine */,
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transmission */,
  "ratio" REAL /* Gear ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_transmissions_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES engines ("engine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_engine_transmissions_transmission_id FOREIGN KEY ("transmission_id") REFERENCES transmissions ("transmission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trim_options" (
  "trim_option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trim option */,
  "trim_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trim */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option (e.g., DVD, Navigation) */,
  "option_description" TEXT /* Description of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trim_option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trim_options_trim_id FOREIGN KEY ("trim_id") REFERENCES trims ("trim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, customer service) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., Sales, Marketing, Customer Service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., vehicle details, trim options) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_history" (
  "vehicle_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle history */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., new, used) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_history_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
